Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to generate a prompt for a target LLM that encourages it to identify anomalies and undesirable behaviors in the given event log hypothesize why these anomalies might occur and propose relevant SQL queries to investigate these hypotheses further

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to output a prompt that will be given to the target LLM So we need to craft a user message that describes the scenario includes the data and asks the LLM to do these things

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have underlying database and schema plus sample data The prompt should be presented in a way that instructs the LLM to act as an analyst reviewing the event log data provided and other tables

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: It should identify anomalies deviations from the normal process flow and hypothesize reasons then propose SQL queries to investigate

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to avoid giving any hints or guidance beyond what is in the prompt however we can include the normal process flow as context that is provided So we should include that

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Given the data there are obvious anomalies cases where activities occur out of order missing activities extra activities timing issues

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1002 Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods before Credit Check and Validate Stock That suggests a possible policy violation shipping before credit check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1003 Ship Goods before Confirm Shipment and Validate Stock missing also Confirm Shipment after Ship Goods and after Issue Invoice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1004 Receive Payment before Issue Invoice and before Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods also missing Credit Check and Validate Stock

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can also hypothesize about resource assignments however resources seem consistent per role department

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The anomalies are interesting The LLM should generate hypotheses such as credit check bypassed for some orders shipment confirmed or shipped before stock validation invoices issued after payment possible data entry errors system or process deviations for priority orders

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Then propose SQL queries to investigate for example count missing activities per case check ordering constraints examine timing between events join with orders to see if order_type influences anomalies join with resources to see if certain departments or roles perform activities out of sequence

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt should be concise but include necessary data Since the data is provided as markdown tables we can include them directly

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus final prompt We have a PostgreSQL database with the following tables Table order_event_log columns case_id event_id activity timestamp resource additional_info Table orders columns case_id customer_id order_type order_value Table resources columns resource_id role department The normal process flow is Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Now here is the data from these tables Your task is identify any anomalies and undesirable behaviors in the given event log hypothesize why these anomalies might occur and propose relevant SQL queries on the order_event_log table and possibly orders and resources tables to investigate these hypotheses further

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The instruction says the target model should be encouraged to identify anomalies hypothesize why and propose relevant SQL queries without any hints or guidance provided here So we need to encourage it to do that and structure the prompt accordingly
